左边 | zuǒbian | left; the left side; to the left of
坐 | zuò | to sit; to take a seat; to take (a bus, airplane etc); to bear fruit
做 | zuò | to do; to make; to produce; to write; to compose; to act as; to engage in
做生意 | zuòshēngyì | to do business
座 | zuò | seat; base; stand; classifier for buildings, mountains and similar immovable objects
座位 | zuòwèi | seat
作业 | zuòyè | school assignment; homework; work; task; operation; to operate
作用 | zuòyòng | to act on; to affect; action; function; activity; impact; result; effect
作者 | zuòzhě | author; writer
